<body onunload="" class="Member_sheet golfMode"><div id="top"></div><div id="rwdScreenMode"></div><div id="wrapper"><div id="rwd_wrapper"><div id="pageHeader" class="smallActivityList hasBanner hasMainNav hasSubNav"><div id="rwdNavBlock"><div id="rwdNavLogo" class="golfLogo"></div><div id="rwdNav" role="navigation"><ul><li aria-haspopup="true" class="topnav_item "><a href="#" class=""><span class="topnav_item">Tee Times</span></a><ul><li aria-haspopup="false" class=""><a href="Member_select" class=""><span class="">Make, Change, or View Tee Times</span></a></li><li aria-haspopup="false" class=""><a href="Member_sheet?index=0" class=""><span class="">Today's Tee Sheet</span></a></li><li aria-haspopup="false" class=""><a href="Member_teelist" class=""><span class="">My Tee Times / Calendar</span></a></li><li aria-haspopup="false" class=" lastItem"><a href="Member_teelist_list" class=""><span class="">My Tee Times / List</span></a></li></ul></li>

<div id="main_ftlogo" class="golfLogo newLogo club_pfcc"></div><div class="after_logo_fix"></div><div class="member_sheet tabular_container rwdFull withCourse withDateSelect hasCourseName">

<div class="tabular_row">

<div class="tabular_cell member_sheet_left">

<div id="member_sheet_calendar" class="calendar member weeks_in_selected_4" data-ftdefaultdate="5/16/2026"></div>

</div>

<div class="tabular_cell member_sheet_right"><div class="sub_instructions pageHelp " data-ftHelpTitle="Instructions"><h2 class="altTitle">Instructions:</h2><p>To select a tee time, just click on the button containing the time<span class="rwdColumnMode"> (1st column)</span>. Special Events and Restrictions, if any, are colored (see legend below). <span class="calUseFull">To display a different day's tee sheet, select the date from the calendar on the left.</span><span class="calUseCompact">To display a different day's tee sheet, select the date using the calendar icon below.</span></p><p>To request multiple tee times, select the number of tee times next to the earliest time desired.</p></div></div>

<div class="clearFix"></div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="rwdCourseDate"><div class="rwdCourseSelect"><form action="Member_sheet" method="get" name="cform_mem" id="cform_mem"><input type="hidden" name="calDate" value="5/16/2026"><input type="hidden" name="displayOpt" value="0"><input type="hidden" name="showAvail" value="-1"><label><b>Course:</b><select size="1" name="course"><option value="Green to Gold">Green to Gold</option><option value="Gold to White">Gold to White</option><option value="White to Green">White to Green</option><option value="Green - 9 Holes">Green - 9 Holes</option><option value="Gold - 9 Holes">Gold - 9 Holes</option><option value="White - 9 Holes">White - 9 Holes</option><option value="Green to White">Green to White</option><option selected value="-ALL-">-ALL-</option></select></label></form></div><div class="rwdDateSelect"><label><b>Date:</b><span>Saturday</span><input type="text" class="ft_date_picker_field calendar member ftMemberSheetCalendar" data-ftdefaultdate="5/16/2026" value="5/16/2026"></label></div><div class="rwdDateSelect" style="display: inline-flex;"><form action="Member_sheet" method="get" name="tform_mem" id="tform_mem"><input type="hidden" name="course" value="-ALL-"><input type="hidden" name="calDate" value="5/16/2026"><input type="hidden" name="showAvail" value="-1"><label><b>Times:</b><select size="1" name="displayOpt"><option value="0" selected>All Day</option><option value="1" >Early Times</option><option value="2" >Later Times</option></select></label></form>&nbsp;<a class="helpButton" href="#" data-fthelp="about_times_option" title="How is the times filter used?"><span>How is the times filter used?</span></a></span></div><div class="rwdDateSelect" style="display: inline-flex;"><form action="Member_sheet" method="get" name="availform_mem" id="availform_mem"><input type="hidden" name="course" value="-ALL-"><input type="hidden" name="calDate" value="5/16/2026"><input type="hidden" name="displayOpt" value="0"><label><b>Available Slots:</b><select size="1" name="showAvail"><option value="-1" selected>All Times</option><option value="0" >Only Available</option><option value="1" >1 Slot</option><option value="2" >2 Slots</option><option value="3" >3 Slots</option><option value="4" >4 Slots</option></select></label></form>&nbsp;<a class="helpButton" href="#" data-fthelp="about_availability_option" title="How is the available slots filter used?"><span>How is the available slots filter used?</span></a></span></div></div><div class="tee_sheet_color_legend">

<p class="button_legend">

<a href="#" data-ftjson="{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;Member_waitlist&quot;,&quot;waitListId&quot;:4,&quot;course&quot;:&quot;Green to Gold&quot;,&quot;returnCourse&quot;:&quot;-ALL-&quot;,&quot;index&quot;:&quot;0&quot;,&quot;date&quot;:20260516}" class="standard_button button_legend_waitlist" style="background-color:#F5F5DC; color:#000000">WAIT LIST SIGN UP</a><a href="#" data-ftjson="{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;event&quot;,&quot;id&quot;:1538}" class="standard_button button_legend_event" style="background-color:Darkorange; color:#000000">Op36 Match 5-16</a>

</p>

</div>

<div class="member_sheet_table standard_list_table rwdCompactible rwdTable rwdShowPgInFull" data-ftDefaultContimes="1">

<div class="rwdCaption">

<p class="fb_legend"><b>F/B:</b>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_F"><span>F</span> = <span>Front Nine</span></span>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_B"><span>B</span> = <span>Back Nine</span></span>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_O"><span>O</span> = <span>Open (for cross-overs)</span></span>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_S"><span>S</span> = <span>Shotgun Event</span></span>

</p>

<p class="cw_legend"><b>C/W:</b>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_CRT"><span>CRT</span> = <span>Cart</span></span>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_WA"><span>WA</span> = <span>Walking</span></span>

<span class="code_legend_item code_legend_PC"><span>PC</span> = <span>Push Cart</span></span>

<span>(__9 = 9 holes)</span>

</p>

<p class="cw_legend"><b>NOTE: For quicker access, some early times are not shown.</b>

<a class="standard_button" style="width:140px" href="Member_sheet?index=0&showAll&course=-ALL-" title="Show All">

Show All Tee Times</a></p>

</div>

<div class="rwdThead"><div class="rwdTr">

<div class="sTime rwdTh">Time</div>

<div class="sSelect rwdTh">#</div>

<div class="sCourseName rwdTh">Course</div>

<div class="sFB rwdTh">F/B</div>

<div class="rwdTh plCol">Players</div><div class="rwdTh pgCol">Player 1</div><div class="rwdTh pgCol">Player 2</div><div class="rwdTh pgCol">Player 3</div><div class="rwdTh pgCol">Player 4</div><div class="rwdTh pgCol">Player 5</div></div></div>

<div class="rwdTbody">

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftOdd" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">4:20 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"><div><span>Todd Beyer</span><span>WA9</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"><div><span>Todd Beyer</span><span>WA9</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftEven" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">4:30 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"><div><span>Jeannette Muecke</span><span>WA</span></div><div><span>Lila Muecke</span><span>WA</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"><div><span>Jeannette Muecke</span><span>WA</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"><div><span>Lila Muecke</span><span>WA</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftOdd" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">4:40 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftEven" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">4:50 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"><div><span>Genie Panaccione</span><span>WA</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"><div><span>Genie Panaccione</span><span>WA</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftOdd" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">5:00 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftEven" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">5:10 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>

<div class="rwdTd sP plCol"><div><span>Richard Lyon</span><span>WA9</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"><div><span>Richard Lyon</span><span>WA9</span></div></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div><div class="rwdTd pgCol"></div></div>

<div class="rwdTr noRowColor ftOdd" data-ftrowtype="Green to Gold:F"><div class="sT rwdTd"><div class="time_slot">5:20 PM</div></div>

<div class="sS rwdTd"></div><div style="background-color:#F5F5DD; color:#000000" class="sN rwdTd">Green to Gold</div>

<div class="sF rwdTd">F</div>
